title: cardamine resedifolia var. gelida
intro: Cardamine resedifolia var. gelida, also known as alpine bitter-cress, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the Brassicaceae family. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and diuretic effects, making it useful in treating conditions such as arthritis, wounds, and urinary tract infections. The health benefits of alpine bitter-cress include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. Alpine bitter-cress can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in traditional herbal medicine to support overall well-being and alleviate various health issues.
